title: [SAM] Spooky Alpha Modpack
description: Play Alpha Minecraft but it makes you scared
body:
## ![sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9207c33c14846bdae3db3770a83c94a345c46e73.png)| This Modpack Might crash your game |

Spooky Alpha is a terrifying Minecraft modpack that plunges you into a world of paranoia and fear. With From the Fog, the infamous Herobrine is no longer just a myth—he's real, lurking just out of sight, watching your every move. Strange sounds, sudden appearances, and eerie phenomena will make you question what’s real and what’s not.

But the horror doesn’t stop there. The Broken Script shatters the rules of reality, introducing glitchy anomalies, distorted environments, and unpredictable events that make the world feel... wrong. Unsettling messages, corrupted visuals, and twisted logic will leave you constantly on edge.

In Spooky Alpha, the unknown is your worst enemy. Will you survive the nightmare, or will you lose yourself to the madness?
